# PRD-002: Billing

## Problem

Customers can't self-serve plan upgrades.

## Goal

Let workspace owners upgrade from the settings screen without support contact.

## Requirements

- PRD-REQ-003: Display current plan and available upgrade options.
- PRD-REQ-004: Confirm plan changes before billing is updated.
